titleStmt.title: SII 24.152: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 152. (A.R. No. 128 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of land by purchase by Araiyaṉ Viradamuḍittāṉ alias Kurukularāyar of Śevvirukkai Chakrapāṇi-nallūr in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam, for rearing a flower garden. The details of the date viz., 9th (8+1st) year, Siṁha, ba, 6, Wednesday, Bharaṇi regularly correspond to A.D. 1224, August 7, Wednesday, ·21. ·62.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirā māṇṭu siṅhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṭṭiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa bharaṇināḷ pāṇṭi kulācaṉi
vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil śrīvaiṣṇa(ṣṇa)varkaḷil tūppil civilli puttūr dāsaṉum En tampi tiruppirampudāsaṉum Ivviruvomum pāṇṭimaṇṭala ttu cevvirukkai nāṭṭu cakkarapāṇinal
lūr Araiyan viratamuṭittāṉāṉa kurukularāyaṟku Icaivu tiṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu . tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil paḻaitāka Ivaṟkuc ceytu varukiṟa tirunantavaṉattukkut tam perāl Ivvūr maṇimaṅkalattut tirumāliruñ
colai nampi pakkal tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil vaṭavoḻukil kācu patiṉāyirattu Aññūṟṟukku vilaikoṇṭu tanta nilam yirumāvarai Innilam Irumāvaraiyum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkuk kaṭamai yi
ṟuttu Iṟai mikutikoṇṭu Ittirunantavaṉam cantirātittavaṟ celvomākavum . Ittirunantavaṉattile nittat tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟittup paṇimāṟak kaṭavomākavum . tiruvaṭinilai
kottuppuṟampe Eḻuntaruḷiṉāl tirumālaiyum Eṭuttut tirukkāṭciyuṅ kāṭṭak kaṭavo mākavum . Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatākac cammatittuk kallilum cempilum veṭṭikku
ṭuttom Ikkurukularāyaṟku civilliputtūr dāsaṉum En tampi tiruppirampu dāsaṉum . Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvilliputtūr dāsaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruppirampu dā
saṉ Eḻuttu ...§
Digital edition of SII 24.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
